items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.description_zh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。

items.title: claude-plugins-official
items.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
items.description_zh: 由 Anthropic 管理的官方高品质 Claude 代码插件目录。

items.title: agentmemory
items.description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
items.description_zh: #1 基于真实世界基准的人工智能编码代理的持久内存

items.title: CloakBrowser
items.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.
items.description_zh: Stealth Chromium 通过了所有机器人检测测试。使用源级指纹补丁替换 Playwright。 30/30 测试通过。

items.title: rtk
items.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
items.description_zh: CLI 代理可将常见开发命令的 LLM 令牌消耗减少 60-90%。单个 Rust 二进制文件，零依赖

items.title: agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.description_zh: 触手可及的完整人工智能机构 - 从前端向导到 Reddit 社区忍者，从奇思妙想的注入者到现实检查者。每个代理都是一位具有个性、流程和经过验证的可交付成果的专业专家。

items.title: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.description_zh: Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 和 OpenCode 的预索引代码知识图 — 更少的标记、更少的工具调用、100% 本地化

items.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
items.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
items.description_zh: 用于改进 Claude 代码行为的单个 CLAUDE.md 文件，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察。

items.title: 12-factor-agents
items.description: What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?
items.description_zh: 我们可以使用哪些原则来构建由 LLM 驱动的软件，这些软件实际上足够好，可以交付给生产客户？

items.title: PhotoGIMP
items.description: A Patch for GIMP 3+ for Photoshop Users
items.description_zh: 面向 Photoshop 用户的 GIMP 3+ 补丁

items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展或像 OpenClaw 这样的 Discord 中免费使用 claude-code（支持语音）
